target_observations.target_description: Obtain and place one furnace block in a fresh natural survival world.
observation_limitations: Milestones are derived from structured runtime evidence and final settlement_state inventory when available.
This artifact is not a benchmark scorer and does not treat provider prose as proof of success.
Visual evidence is supporting evidence; renderer artifacts and camera framing must be reviewed separately.
